title: fagraea tuyukii
intro: Fagraea tuyukii, also known as the Philippine frangipani or tuyuk, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Fagraea tuyukii include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Fagraea tuyukii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
